evidence: "Well acted drama about the life of Chet Baker."
"...every moment will keep you totally engrossed in the mystical plot lines."
"...the screenplay itself seems a little contrived."
"...the screenplay seems to portray the central character... in an almost one dimensional manner."
"...the film draws you into the war effort..."
"The acting by Michael Caine and the rest of the crew is flawless..."
"Fine performances by Robert DeNiro, Jeremy Irons, and Liam Neeson give this excellent screenplay the acting it truly deserves."
"Created with the help of the Stephen Sondheim himself..."
"...the final collaboration between Frances Coppola and Mario Puzo."
"The jungle and waterfall scenes are spectacular."
"...the movie has a remarkable final scene, with the shooting death of Claire Quilty."
"This is one of these films that will be valuable over time..."
"...the film makes the otherwise potentially uninteresting business of mathematics and code breaking very interesting indeed."

summary: The user has a strong preference for drama and complex narratives, often appreciating high-quality production and emotional depth in films. They enjoy films that provoke thought and engage with societal issues, while also valuing strong performances from actors and directors.
